exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Hold at 70kg. All 20 reps at RPE 9 last time — don't chase weight on cut.

exercises.name: Leg Press 45°
exercises.notes: +2.5kg. All 3x12 at RPE 8 last session — earned the bump.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Down from 20kg. Stop set 1 at 10 even if you have more — save it for sets 2-3. Progress to 10-10-10, then back to 20kg.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: BW. Stop set 1 at 10 — don't empty the tank. Progress to 10-10-10, then 12-12-12.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Starting weight — adjust on the fly. Go lighter if form breaks, heavier if too easy. EZ bar or straight bar.
